title: Adding an item to a group - CRM
excerpt: Add the ability to insert a line above or below. This feature is available in work management, but not in CRM. The contacts and accounts lists can get very long and it is not enjoyable to have to scroll to the bottom of …

posts.author: Stef2173 (Stefanie Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the ability to insert a line above or below. This feature is available in work management, but not in CRM. The contacts and accounts lists can get very long and it is not enjoyable to have to scroll to the bottom of a list to add. Thank you for your consideration.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Stephanie! I spoke with @danaaviv from the CRM team and they explained that when you click on new item, a blue button it will open on the top of the group.

image (2)1358×756 67.2 KB

Hope this helps!
